ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the team owner */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name or ID of the team coach */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "league_founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_president" TEXT /* Name or ID of the league president */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_founded" INTEGER /* Year the division was founded */,
  "division_president" TEXT /* Name or ID of the division president */,
  "division_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the division's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, overtime loss) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name or ID of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored against the team */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of game time the team had possession */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "otl" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Number of points */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Total shots on goal */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Total corner kicks */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the standing belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the standing belongs to */,
  "standing" TEXT /* Standing of the team (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points the team has */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the team */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the team */,
  "games_tied" INTEGER /* Number of games tied by the team */,
  "overtime_losses" INTEGER /* Number of overtime losses */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals scored against the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the team */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
